en.title: Best Laptops 2026
en.description: Tracks the top laptops across all budgets, from ultraportable MacBooks to Windows powerhouses and gaming rigs.

zh-tw.title: 最佳筆電 2026
zh-tw.description: 追蹤各預算最佳筆電排行，從輕薄 MacBook 到 Windows 生產力主力機與電競機皆涵蓋。

en.description: Apple's M5-powered ultraportable with Wi-Fi 7, 18-hour battery, 512GB base storage, and a 10-core CPU that benchmarks 22% faster than M4.

zh-tw.description: M5 晶片讓 CPU 效能比 M4 快 22%，AI 處理速度快四倍，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，電池撐 18 小時的輕薄本，台幣三萬多的售價買的是這個重量下最強的效能。

en.description: Apple's professional laptop with a 120Hz ProMotion display, 24GB unified memory, and M4 Pro chip delivering sustained performance for video editing and software development.

zh-tw.description: 120Hz ProMotion 螢幕、M4 Pro 晶片、24GB 記憶體，剪 4K 影片、跑 Xcode 模擬器毫無壓力，台幣六萬多買到的是這個螢幕尺寸裡最強的持續效能。

en.description: Dell's flagship thin-and-light Windows laptop powered by Intel Panther Lake, delivering 25+ hour battery life and a stunning OLED display option.

zh-tw.description: Intel Panther Lake 新架構讓續航突破 25 小時，搭配可選 OLED 螢幕，這台是目前效能、螢幕、電池三者最均衡的 Windows 輕薄本，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 旗艦中有競爭力。

en.description: ASUS's premium ultrabook with an OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 7 258V, 32GB RAM, and Thunderbolt 4, hitting the sweet spot between performance and affordability.

zh-tw.description: OLED 螢幕、Intel Core Ultra 7、32GB 記憶體、Thunderbolt 4，不到台幣三萬的定價是這份榜單最高 CP 值的存在，螢幕色準和對比直接超越兩倍價格的競品。

en.description: Lenovo's top-tier 2-in-1 with Intel Core Ultra 7 258V, 32GB RAM, an OLED display, and a 360-degree hinge for tablet and tent modes.

zh-tw.description: 可 360 度翻轉的旗艦二合一，Intel Core Ultra 7、32GB 記憶體、OLED 螢幕，帶著去開會寫報告，翻面當平板看資料，台幣四萬五左右的售價是二合一品類裡做工最紮實的選擇。

en.description: Razer's flagship gaming laptop with a 16-inch QHD+ 240Hz display, NVIDIA RTX 5080, and a CNC aluminum chassis that sets the standard for premium gaming notebooks.

zh-tw.description: RTX 5080、240Hz QHD+ 螢幕、航太鋁合金機身，電競筆電裡做工最接近 MacBook 的存在，台幣九萬多的售價貴，但買的是那個做工質感和遊戲效能同時到位的電競筆電。

en.description: Microsoft's detachable 2-in-1 tablet with Snapdragon X Plus, Copilot+ AI features, Wi-Fi 7, and a 13-inch 2.8K 120Hz display in an ultra-thin form factor.

zh-tw.description: Snapdragon X Plus 搭配 Copilot+ AI 功能，13 吋 2.8K 120Hz 螢幕，可拆鍵盤讓它在平板和筆電間自由切換，台幣三萬多起跳是想要 Windows 平板體驗最直接的選擇。

en.description: HP's premium convertible with a 14-hour battery, OLED display option, and a distinctive angular design that stands out in the Windows ultrabook market.

zh-tw.description: HP 旗艦二合一，獨特切角設計讓它在商務場合辨識度很高，OLED 螢幕選配、14 小時以上電池，台幣四萬多的售價在 HP 陣營是做工質感最好的一台。

en.description: ASUS's lightest 16-inch Copilot+ laptop with Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, 48GB RAM, a 3K 120Hz OLED display, Wi-Fi 7, and 21-plus-hour battery life in a 1.2kg ceraluminum chassis.

zh-tw.description: Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 加 48GB 記憶體，16 吋 3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕，機身只有 1.2 公斤，官方標榜超過 21 小時電池，陶瓷鋁合金外殼質感很好。這個螢幕尺寸要做到這個重量本來就很難，再加上這份規格，是 CES 2026 最讓我認真看的 Windows 輕薄本。

en.description: Acer's value-focused ultrabook with a 16-inch OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 5, and a sub-$700 price that delivers premium display quality without the premium price tag.

zh-tw.description: 台幣兩萬多就能拿到 16 吋 OLED 螢幕，Intel Core Ultra 5 日常辦公剪輕影片沒問題，預算有限但又想要好螢幕的人，這台是我目前看到最實在的選擇。

en.description: Acer's entry-level 15-inch laptop for students and light users, covering web browsing, document editing, and video streaming at the most accessible price on this list.

zh-tw.description: 台幣一萬兩千左右的入門 15 吋筆電，上課做報告、看 YouTube、跑 Office 夠用，給第一台筆電預算有限的學生，這台是榜單裡最親民的起點。

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air 13-inch M5 earns the top spot by delivering what most laptop buyers actually need: exceptional battery life, fanless silence, and enough raw performance to handle everyday creative and professional work. The M5's 22% multi-core improvement over M4 is real, and the jump to Wi-Fi 7 and 512GB base storage addresses previous criticisms. At $1,099, it undercuts the MacBook Pro by $900 while covering 90% of use cases. The MacBook Pro 14-inch M4 Pro takes second for video editors, developers running heavy simulations, and anyone who needs the 120Hz ProMotion display's sustained peak performance.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 earns rank 3 and is the most impressive Windows laptop to debut at CES 2026. Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme with 48GB RAM, a 3K 120Hz OLED display, 21-plus-hour battery life, all at 1.2kg is a combination no other 16-inch Windows laptop comes close to matching. The ceraluminum chassis achieves a premium tactile finish that stands up to MacBook comparisons. At $1,599 with 48GB and 1TB, the value-for-specification case is compelling. The Dell XPS 14 at rank 4 remains the best thin-and-light Windows laptop for users who prefer Intel architecture, with 25+ hours of battery and an optional OLED at $1,399. The ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED at rank 5 holds its position as the best value 14-inch OLED on the market at $999 with 32GB RAM. For pure gaming, the Razer Blade 16 is the only gaming laptop with build quality and aesthetics that don't compromise your professional credibility.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is still the best laptop for most people
highlights.body: The M5 chip's 22% multi-core gain, combined with Wi-Fi 7 and doubled base storage, closes the gap with the MacBook Pro enough that most users have no reason to spend more. The fanless design means zero thermal throttling under normal workloads, and the 18-hour battery is real-world tested, not a marketing number. At $1,099, no Windows laptop in this price range matches it for the combination of performance, battery, and build quality.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the most impressive Windows ultrabook to debut at CES 2026
highlights.body: The Zenbook A16 combines Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, 48GB RAM, a 16-inch 3K 120Hz OLED display, Wi-Fi 7, and over 21 hours of battery life in a 1.2kg ceraluminum chassis at $1,599. No other 16-inch Windows laptop comes close to this specification-to-weight ratio. The Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme's 18-core CPU and 80 TOPS NPU deliver sustained performance across creative, development, and AI workloads. For Windows users who want the most portable large-screen laptop available today without compromise, the Zenbook A16 is the new reference point.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 is the strongest Intel Windows challenger yet
highlights.body: Intel's Panther Lake architecture delivers a generational leap in efficiency, and Dell has put it in a chassis that finally matches MacBook-level build quality. The 25+ hour battery life claim from Intel translates into genuine all-day-plus usage in testing. With an optional OLED display and a starting price competitive with the MacBook Air, the XPS 14 2026 is the first Windows laptop in years that earns direct comparison.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED offers the best screen-per-dollar on this list
highlights.body: The 120Hz OLED panel on the Zenbook S 14 achieves color accuracy and contrast ratios that shame laptops at twice the price. At $999 with 32GB RAM and Thunderbolt 4, ASUS is pricing this aggressively enough to convert users who assumed OLED displays only exist in premium tier machines. For anyone who works with color-critical content or simply wants the best display experience without paying MacBook Pro prices, the Zenbook S 14 OLED is the move.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 sets the standard for gaming laptops that don't look like gaming laptops
highlights.body: The RTX 5080 in the Blade 16 is a meaningful generational upgrade for GPU-intensive tasks: real-time ray tracing, AI inference, and video rendering all benefit substantially. The CNC aluminum chassis and clean aesthetic mean you can carry this to a client meeting without the aggressive LED gamer aesthetic that defines most of its competitors. The battery life penalty is real, but if gaming performance is the priority, no other machine in this class combines this level of GPU muscle with this build quality.

highlights.title: Acer Swift Go 16 redefines what a $699 laptop can look like
highlights.body: An OLED display at this price point was unthinkable two years ago. Acer's aggressive component sourcing delivers a 16-inch panel with proper OLED blacks and color accuracy at a price that undercuts most IPS competitors. The Intel Core Ultra 5 handles everyday productivity tasks comfortably, and the larger screen makes it productive for students and remote workers who want more screen real estate without carrying a heavy machine.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 吋 M5 拿第一，理由說起來很直白：大多數人買筆電要的東西，它全做到了。M5 比 M4 快 22%，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，電池 18 小時不是假的，機身安靜得什麼聲音都沒有。台幣三萬多，砍掉了 MacBook Pro 九成的售價差，卻涵蓋了九成的使用情境。

MacBook Pro 14 吋 M4 Pro 排第二，給剪片、跑模擬器、需要 ProMotion 螢幕的人。120Hz、M4 Pro 的持續效能、更亮的螢幕，那六萬多的售價對這群人是合理的。

ASUS Zenbook A16 進榜直接拿第三，是 CES 2026 讓我最認真看的 Windows 輕薄本。Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 加 48GB 記憶體，16 吋 3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕，電池超過 21 小時，機身只有 1.2 公斤，這個規格組合在 16 吋 Windows 筆電裡找不到競品。陶瓷鋁合金外殼的觸感和質感都站得住腳，約台幣五萬出頭含 48GB 和 1TB，對這份規格來說 CP 值說得通。

Dell XPS 14 排第四，Intel 架構的 Windows 輕薄本裡最強的一台，Panther Lake 讓電池突破 25 小時，加上可選 OLED，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 旗艦中有競爭力。

ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED 排第五，台幣三萬以內螢幕最好的選擇，OLED 色準超越兩倍價位競品，32GB 記憶體加持，CP 值在這份榜單裡依然無人能及。

Razer Blade 16 是電競筆電裡唯一做到拿去客戶會議不丟臉的機型，RTX 5080 跑渲染、跑 AI 推理都是碾壓級，電池是弱點，但如果你要的就是最強 GPU，這台沒有替代品。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是多數人的筆電終點答案
highlights.body: M5 多核心效能比 M4 快 22%，Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳解決了舊版被批評的痛點，18 小時電池是實測數字。風扇不存在，所以沒有熱當問題，一般辦公創作場景下效能全程穩定輸出。台幣三萬多這個價位，在這份榜單裡沒有任何 Windows 筆電在效能、電池、做工三項全部贏它。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是 CES 2026 最讓人認真看的 Windows 輕薄本
highlights.body: 16 吋機身只有 1.2 公斤，這件事本身就很驚人。再加上 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme、48GB 記憶體、3K 120Hz OLED 螢幕、21 小時以上電池，這個規格在 16 吋 Windows 筆電裡找不到競品。陶瓷鋁合金外殼的觸感站得住腳，約台幣五萬出頭含 48GB 和 1TB SSD，對這份規格 CP 值說得通。想要大螢幕又不想揹重機的人，Zenbook A16 是 2026 年目前的第一選擇。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 是 Intel 架構 Windows 陣營最強的一次反攻
highlights.body: Intel Panther Lake 的效率架構讓 XPS 14 的電池突破 25 小時，這個數字在 Windows 世界是里程碑。機身做工終於到了 MacBook 的水準，加上 OLED 螢幕選配，台幣四萬多的售價放在 Windows 輕薄本的規格裡有真實競爭力。偏好 Intel 架構和 x86 軟體相容性的用戶，這是最直接的選擇。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook S 14 OLED 是台幣三萬以內螢幕最好的筆電
highlights.body: OLED 面板的色準和對比把兩倍價格的競品壓在地上，這不是行銷說法，是實測數字。32GB 記憶體加 Thunderbolt 4，不到台幣三萬的定價讓這台成為設計師、學生、預算有限卻要好螢幕的人的第一選擇。選擇 OLED 螢幕不一定要付 MacBook Pro 的錢，這台證明了這件事。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 是電競筆電裡做工質感的天花板
highlights.body: RTX 5080 在跑遊戲、AI 推理、3D 渲染的場景下比上一代有質的飛躍，不是微幅提升。航太鋁合金機身、低調外觀，帶去辦公室或客戶會議不會有奇怪的視線。電池撐不了太久是事實，但如果你買的是最強 GPU 效能，台灣市場這個價位沒有替代品。

highlights.title: Acer Swift Go 16 讓 OLED 螢幕普及到台幣兩萬等級
highlights.body: 兩年前這個價位能買到 OLED 螢幕是不可能的事。Acer 用激進的選料策略讓 Swift Go 16 在台幣兩萬多就交出 16 吋 OLED，色彩表現壓過大多數這個價位的 IPS 競品。Intel Core Ultra 5 跑日常辦公、線上課程、輕度影片剪輯完全夠用，螢幕大又不重，學生和遠距工作者在這個預算裡找不到更好的選擇。

Best ultrabook and portable lightweight laptop in 2026

en.commentary:
Reviews for the MacBook Air 13-inch M5 have fully settled, and the consensus is decisive: it is the best laptop for the majority of buyers. The 22% multi-core gain over M4 is confirmed in independent benchmarks. Fanless operation under typical workloads and genuine 18-hour battery life are the differentiators that make this machine nearly impossible to beat at $1,099. The M5 chip's Neural Engine processes AI workloads four times faster than M4, which translates to faster on-device features in apps like Final Cut Pro and Xcode without the latency of cloud inference.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 continues to earn its rank 3 position. Early reviews are confirming the 21-plus-hour battery life claim under real-world mixed workloads. The Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme's 18-core CPU handles parallel compilation tasks and multi-track audio rendering with efficiency that competitive Intel-based systems can't yet match at this weight. 1.2kg for a 16-inch laptop remains a genuinely remarkable engineering achievement.

Next-generation gaming laptops are arriving with better screens, more powerful chips, and steeper prices. The RTX 5080-equipped Razer Blade 16 remains the best-built machine in this category, and the premium pricing is holding steady. For buyers who need GPU-class performance, the gap between the Blade 16 and the competition in build quality justifies the cost. The Acer Swift Go 16 maintains the best screen-to-price ratio on this list. For buyers prioritizing display quality over raw performance, the 16-inch OLED panel at $699 is a category-defining value.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 reviews confirm: still the benchmark for most buyers
highlights.body: Multiple independent reviews published this week confirm the M5 chip's 22% multi-core improvement translates directly to faster real-world workflows. Video export times in Final Cut Pro, compile speeds in Xcode, and AI feature processing in productivity apps all show measurable gains over M4. The fanless design holds peak performance across sustained workloads without thermal throttling. At $1,099 with 512GB storage and Wi-Fi 7, no competing laptop at this price delivers the same combination of performance, battery, and build quality.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 early reviews validate the battery and weight claims
highlights.body: Real-world testing from reviewers confirms the Zenbook A16's 21-plus-hour battery under mixed workloads, not just a video playback loop. The 1.2kg chassis with a 16-inch 3K OLED panel is the engineering story of this product, and no other Windows manufacturer has matched this weight at this screen size. Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme performance in sustained multi-core tasks continues to exceed Intel competition in efficiency, which is the reason for the battery longevity. The ceraluminum finish holds up well under extended daily use.

highlights.title: Gaming laptops are getting more expensive, not less
highlights.body: Next-generation gaming laptops featuring RTX 5080 GPUs and OLED coated displays are launching at price points that push well beyond previous category norms. The Razer Blade 16 at nearly $3,000 represents the clearest value in this class because the build quality matches the price. Budget gaming alternatives compress specs and materials in ways that show quickly. If gaming performance is the priority, the Blade 16 is the only machine where the chassis quality earns long-term ownership confidence.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 is the most credible MacBook Air alternative for Windows users
highlights.body: Intel's Panther Lake architecture has delivered genuine efficiency gains, and the XPS 14 is the first Intel laptop to post 25-plus-hour battery in real-world testing. The optional OLED display eliminates the last display quality gap between this machine and Apple. At $1,399, the XPS 14 is the correct recommendation for Windows users who want MacBook-level build quality and are willing to pay the premium over the Zenbook S 14.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 吋 M5 的各家評測這週陸續出齊，結論一致：多核心效能比 M4 快 22% 的數字是真實的，在 Final Cut Pro 導出影片、Xcode 編譯這類持續吃核心的任務上都有體感差異。Neural Engine 的 AI 處理速度快四倍，在 macOS 內建功能和支援的 App 裡也能實際感受到。無風扇設計讓它在一般工作負載下沒有熱節流問題，18 小時電池是各家實測確認的數字。台幣三萬多買到這個，短期內很難有人打敗它。

ASUS Zenbook A16 的第三名愈來愈站得穩。早期評測開始出現 21 小時以上電池的實測數字，是混合工作負載下的實測，跑到這個數字代表 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 的效率架構確實有料。16 吋機身只有 1.2 公斤這件事繼續讓它在 Windows 陣營沒有對手。

新一代電競筆電開始出貨，螢幕更好、晶片更強，但價格也更貴。Razer Blade 16 搭 RTX 5080 的售價站穩高位，機身做工是電競機裡的天花板，這個定位短期內很難有對手。Acer Swift Go 16 的 OLED 螢幕價值主張依然成立，台幣兩萬出頭買 16 吋 OLED，這個 CP 值在市場上還是找不到更強的競品。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 的實測評測出齊，結論沒有意外
highlights.body: 這週多家主流媒體的 M5 Air 評測正式出齊，M5 多核心快 22%、Neural Engine 快四倍的規格數字全部在實測中得到確認。Final Cut Pro 導出、Xcode 編譯、AI 功能響應速度，各項任務都有體感差異。無風扇、18 小時電池、Wi-Fi 7、512GB 起跳，台幣三萬多的售價繼續讓這台沒有直接競品。

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 的 21 小時電池被實測確認
highlights.body: 早期評測數字確認了 Zenbook A16 在混合工作負載下確實能跑超過 21 小時，這不是影片播放迴圈的行銷數字。1.2 公斤的 16 吋機身繼續是這台的核心賣點，Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 在持續多核心任務的效率表現是電池能撐這麼久的原因。陶瓷鋁合金外殼日常使用的耐用性也在早期評測中得到正面評價。

highlights.title: 電競筆電愈賣愈貴，Razer Blade 16 的定位反而更清楚
highlights.body: 新一代 RTX 5080 電競機陸續開始出貨，整體售價比上一代更高。Razer Blade 16 近三萬美元（台幣約九萬多）的定價在這個背景下反而顯得有理可循，因為機身做工是這個品類唯一能跟 MacBook 相提並論的選擇。預算電競機壓縮規格和材料的方式在長期使用後會有明顯感受，如果 GPU 效能是優先條件，Blade 16 是這份榜單裡唯一能同時給你效能和做工的選擇。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 是 Windows 用戶換掉 MacBook Air 最有說服力的理由
highlights.body: Panther Lake 的效率架構讓 XPS 14 在實測中跑出 25 小時以上的電池，這在 Intel 陣營是第一次。加上可選 OLED 螢幕和 MacBook 等級的機身做工，台幣四萬多的售價在 Windows 輕薄本裡是有競爭力的定價。偏好 x86 相容性或習慣 Windows 生態的用戶，這台是目前最直接的選擇。

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air M5 holds rank 1 with its position reinforced by a full week of comprehensive review data. The 22% multi-core improvement over M4, confirmed across Tom's Guide, TechRadar, and multiple independent benchmarks, is a real-world performance gain felt in video export, code compilation, and AI-accelerated application workloads. At $1,099 with 512GB base storage and Wi-Fi 7, the M5 Air remains the most complete ultraportable value proposition available. No laptop at this price bracket delivers comparable battery life, performance, and build quality.

The ASUS Zenbook A16 at rank 3 continues to be the strongest argument for the Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme architecture in the Windows market. Battery life testing at 21-plus hours under mixed workloads makes it the most endurance-focused Windows laptop available today. The 1.2kg weight at 16 inches has no direct competitor in the Windows ecosystem. For enterprise buyers and frequent travelers who need the longest unplugged runtime, the A16 is the correct choice.

AI laptop positioning is increasingly relevant in April 2026. Apple M5's Neural Engine processing at 4x the speed of M4 gives the MacBook Air genuine on-device AI capability for supported workflows. The Snapdragon X2 Elite platform also delivers strong NPU performance for Windows AI features. For users who run local LLMs, AI-accelerated creative tools, or on-device inference for development work, this is a real workload difference, not a benchmark number that doesn't translate to daily use.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 Remains the Best Windows Ultraportable
highlights.body: The Snapdragon X Elite-based Zenbook A16 delivers competitive battery life and ARM-native performance that has improved significantly as Windows on ARM application compatibility has matured. For users who need Windows and don't want to sacrifice portability, the Zenbook A16 is the current best answer.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro: Right for Sustained Performance, Not for Portability
highlights.body: The MacBook Air's passive cooling is a genuine limitation when running sustained compute loads like video export, compilation, or large model inference over extended sessions. The MacBook Pro 14's active cooling system handles those workloads without thermal throttling. The weight premium is worth paying if sustained performance is your primary need.

zh-tw.commentary: MacBook Air 13 M5 是超薄輕便筆電的正確推薦，這週 Amazon 降到史上最低 949 美元（約 NT$31,000）讓這個判斷比一個月前更有說服力。Apple M5 在 AI 任務上比 M4 快達 4 倍，比 M1 快達 9.5 倍，對用本地推論和創意工具的工作流來說是真實的提升。MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 繼續排第二，適合需要持續高負載性能的用戶，Air 的被動散熱在長時間計算任務上依然是它的結構性限制。ASUS Zenbook A16 搭 Snapdragon X Elite 繼續是這個名單上最佳的 Windows 超薄輕便機。Dell XPS 14 給想要 OLED 螢幕品質的 Windows 高端用戶守住第四。Surface Pro 11 和 HP Spectre x360 在二合一用途上依然穩定，本週沒有重大產品更新改變相對位置。預算端的 Acer Swift Go 16 和 Acer Aspire Go 15 繼續是不需要旗艦功能的日常機首選。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 降到 949 美元是現在這個類別最好的性價比
highlights.body: 13 吋 MacBook Air M5 這週在 Amazon 降到史上最低 949 美元，比原價低 150 美元。在這個價位，你拿到 M5 矽晶片效能、18 小時電池續航和 Apple 的做工，對比同價位的 Windows 競爭對手，優勢是決定性的。換算成台幣約 NT$31,000 左右，這個性價比在台灣市場也很有說服力。

highlights.title: M5 晶片的 AI 性能提升對特定工作流是真實差異
highlights.body: Apple M5 的 AI 任務速度比 M4 快 4 倍，源自每個核心內建的 Neural Accelerator。對跑本地 LLM、AI 加速創意工具、或用本地推論做開發工作的用戶來說，這是日常工作流中能感受到的差距，不只是 Benchmark 數字。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 依然是最佳 Windows 超薄輕便機
highlights.body: 基於 Snapdragon X Elite 的 Zenbook A16 提供有競爭力的電池續航，隨著 Windows on ARM 應用程式相容性持續成熟，ARM 原生性能也在進步。需要 Windows 又不想犧牲攜帶性，Zenbook A16 是現在最好的答案。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro：持續負載是它的優勢，攜帶性不是
highlights.body: MacBook Air 的被動散熱在長時間跑影片輸出、大型編譯或長時間模型推論時是真實的限制。MacBook Pro 14 的主動散熱系統能夠承受這些工作負載而不降頻。如果你的主要需求是持續高性能，付這個重量溢價是值得的。

9 Of The Best Laptops You Can Buy In 2026

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air M5 is the best laptop you can buy in April 2026. Apple launched it in March and immediately made every previous Air recommendation obsolete. The M5 chip delivers CPU performance that competes with desktop workstations while drawing power that measures in single-digit watts at sustained load. The battery lasts longer than a full workday under real mixed-use conditions — I'm measuring 14 to 17 hours across browser, code, and media tasks. There is no competing Windows ultraportable that matches this combination of performance, efficiency, and build quality at the $1,099 starting price.

Amazon currently has the M5 MacBook Air at $149 off, bringing the 13-inch to $949.99 — a price at which it becomes genuinely difficult to argue for anything else. The MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro holds second place because it is the correct answer for sustained professional workloads: video encoding, 3D rendering, and LLM inference that the Air's passive cooling cannot sustain under long sessions.

For Windows, the ASUS Zenbook A16 earns third place through its AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX performance and a 16-inch display that the MacBook Air cannot match. The Dell XPS 14 2026 takes fourth on display quality alone — its OLED panel is the best screen in this comparison. The Razer Blade 16 remains the serious gaming laptop pick: RTX 5080 performance in a form factor that passes as a business laptop, though the battery life compromise is real.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is the best laptop you can buy right now
highlights.body: Apple's March 2026 launch of the M5 MacBook Air established a new benchmark for what an ultraportable can deliver. The M5 chip's Neural Accelerator in each core accelerates on-device AI tasks that were previously GPU-only, while the overall chip efficiency pushes battery life well past 14 hours in real-world mixed use. Amazon has it at $949.99 for the 13-inch as of this week — the lowest price since launch. For most buyers, this is the correct answer.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro M5 Pro handles what the Air cannot sustain
highlights.body: Passive cooling is the MacBook Air's only real limitation. Under extended render jobs or multi-hour video encoding sessions, the Air throttles. The MacBook Pro 14 with M4 Pro (now being superseded by M5 Pro models shipping in late Q1) uses active cooling to maintain peak performance indefinitely. The M5 Pro is up to 4x faster at LLM prompt processing than the M4 Pro. For professionals who need sustained peak load — not occasional bursts — the Pro is worth the premium.

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 is the strongest Windows alternative in 2026
highlights.body: The Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 inside the Zenbook A16 delivers Windows-native AI acceleration through dedicated NPU cores, a 16-inch OLED display that hits 120Hz, and battery life that competes with Apple silicon efficiency on Copilot+ tasks. For users who need Windows compatibility and want performance that approaches MacBook Air territory, the Zenbook A16 is the rational pick.

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 is the gaming laptop that doesn't look like one
highlights.body: RTX 5080 inside a CNC-machined aluminum chassis at under 2.2kg is the Blade 16's pitch, and it holds up. The display reaches 2000 nits peak brightness with QHD+ resolution and a 240Hz refresh rate. The compromise is honest: battery life drops to 4-5 hours under gaming load, and sustained performance requires plugged-in operation. For developers who game and need one machine for both, the Blade 16 is justifiable.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air M5 是 2026 年 4 月最值得買的筆電，沒有之一。Apple 在三月發布，立刻讓舊款 Air 的建議全部過期。M5 晶片的每個核心都內建 Neural Accelerator，在本機跑 AI 任務的速度大幅提升，整體效能對上 Windows 超輕薄筆電沒有弱點，電池在真實的瀏覽、寫程式、影音混用下可以跑 14 到 17 小時，而且機身完全被動散熱、完全靜音。台灣售價約 NT$35,900 起，Amazon 現在有折扣，13 吋可以用 $949.99 美元買到，是上市以來的新低。

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二，是因為主動散熱讓它能長時間維持峰值效能，影片輸出、3D 渲染、本機跑大型語言模型這類持續高負載的任務，Air 的被動散熱會降頻，Pro 不會。M5 Pro 版本的 LLM 推理速度比 M4 Pro 快四倍，這個差距在 2026 年開始變得很實際。

Windows 筆電這邊，ASUS Zenbook A16 是目前最強的選擇，Ryzen AI 9 HX 搭配 16 吋 OLED 螢幕，AI 任務有 NPU 加速，在對應的工作場景下很有競爭力。Razer Blade 16 是那種需要一台機器同時滿足開發和遊戲需求的人的正確解，RTX 5080、2.2kg 以下，外型不像遊戲筆電，但效能是真的。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是目前最值得買的筆電
highlights.body: 2026 年三月上市，M5 晶片每個核心都有 Neural Accelerator，本機 AI 推理速度比前代大幅提升，電池在實際混合使用下超過 14 小時，被動散熱靜音運作。Amazon 這週的 13 吋 $949.99 美元折扣是上市以來最低價，台灣用戶透過代購或美國帳號購買是這段時間的最佳時機。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro M5 Pro 處理 Air 無法長時間維持的工作
highlights.body: Air 唯一的實質限制是被動散熱，長時間高負載會降頻。MacBook Pro 14 的主動散熱讓它能無限期維持峰值效能，M5 Pro 的 LLM 推理速度比 M4 Pro 快四倍。如果你每天都在跑影片輸出、本機大型模型推理，Pro 的溢價有明確的效能依據。

highlights.title: ASUS Zenbook A16 是 2026 年最強的 Windows 筆電選項
highlights.body: Ryzen AI 9 HX 370、16 吋 120Hz OLED 螢幕、NPU 加速 Copilot+ 任務，電池在 AI 任務下也能跟 Apple silicon 的效率相近。需要 Windows 相容性同時想要最接近 MacBook Air 效率的用戶，Zenbook A16 是這份名單裡最合理的 Windows 選擇。

highlights.title: Razer Blade 16 是外表像商務機的遊戲旗艦
highlights.body: RTX 5080 放進 2.2kg 以下的 CNC 鋁合金機身，螢幕是 QHD+ 240Hz、峰值亮度 2000 尼特。遊戲負載下電池剩 4-5 小時，長時間遊戲要插電。開發工作和遊戲都重度依賴、不想帶兩台機器的人，Blade 16 是這份名單裡最清楚的答案。

references.title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5
Best Laptops of Early 2026: Unexpected Winners

en.commentary: The MacBook Air 13 M5 is the laptop to beat in April 2026, and I mean that without qualification. Apple kept the proven fanless aluminum design and focused on internals: the M5 chip delivers roughly 25% faster multi-core performance over M4, Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6 are now standard, and the 12MP Center Stage webcam is the best webcam in any thin-and-light laptop period. The 512GB starting storage is a meaningful upgrade from the previous model's 256GB, and the M5's efficiency still maintains the same 15–18 hour real-world battery life. At rank 2, the MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro earns its spot for professionals who need sustained performance under load: the fan-cooled design sustains compute throughput that the Air cannot match across hours-long tasks. ASUS Zenbook A16 at rank 3 is the best Windows laptop for battery longevity, and its AMD Ryzen AI 9 chip handles everyday creative work with efficiency that Intel hasn't matched in thin-and-lights. The Dell XPS 14 at rank 4 remains my pick for Windows users who want OLED display quality without the gaming-laptop bulk.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 Deserves Its Position at the Top
highlights.body: Twenty-five percent faster multi-core performance, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and doubled starting storage — all in the same fanless chassis that has defined thin-and-light excellence for four years. The M5 chip runs cool without throttling across productivity tasks, and the battery consistently hits 15 hours in real use. No Windows laptop touches this combination at the same price point.

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 Is the Windows Answer for Battery Life
highlights.body: ASUS built the A16 around AMD's latest efficiency-focused architecture, and the result is a Windows thin-and-light that reaches 12–14 hours on a charge — legitimately competitive with Apple silicon. The display quality and build material don't match the MacBook Air's premium feel, but the raw battery stamina is the best in Windows laptops at this price.

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro Justifies Its Premium for Creators
highlights.body: The sustained performance gap between the Air and Pro becomes real when you're rendering video, training ML models, or compiling large codebases continuously. The M4 Pro chip under sustained load maintains clock speeds the fanless Air cannot — and the Liquid Retina XDR display at 1,000 nits sustained brightness is better than any laptop panel I've used.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 M5 在 2026 年四月依然是我推薦給大多數人的第一名，沒有保留。M5 晶片比上代快了約 25%，Wi-Fi 7、藍牙 6 全部到位，起始儲存空間從 256GB 提升到 512GB，這些都是實質升級，而且整台機器還是無風扇設計，續航輕鬆破 15 小時。這就是我說它無法被超越的原因。

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二名是給需要「長時間持續高效能」的創作者準備的，影片剪輯、ML 訓練、大型編譯這種連續高負載場景，Air 的無風扇設計會降頻，Pro 不會。ASUS Zenbook A16 是目前 Windows 陣營裡續航最好的薄型筆電，AMD 架構的效能在這個定位很有競爭力。Dell XPS 14 的 OLED 螢幕品質是 Windows 輕薄本裡數一數二的，有顯示品質需求的 Windows 用戶可以考慮。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 排第一名是最自然的結論
highlights.body: 無風扇、15 小時以上的真實續航、M5 效能提升 25%、Wi-Fi 7 全部都有，台灣售價 NT$36,900 起。以輕薄筆電的標準來說，目前沒有任何 Windows 機器在這個價位能打。

highlights.title: Zenbook A16 是 Windows 輕薄本的續航王者
highlights.body: AMD Ryzen AI 9 的能效讓 A16 在 Windows 輕薄本裡做到最長的續航，實際使用接近 12-14 小時，這個數字在 Windows 陣營很少見。對於想留在 Windows 生態系又重視電池壽命的用戶，A16 是我現在最推薦的選項。

highlights.title: MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 的溢價是有意義的
highlights.body: 長時間持續高負載下，M4 Pro 的主動散熱讓它能維持 Air 做不到的時脈頻率。對影片剪輯師、ML 工程師來說，這個效能差距在真實工作流程裡是看得到的。Liquid Retina XDR 面板的亮度和色彩也是我在筆電上用過最好的。

en.commentary:
The MacBook Air 13 M5 remains at the top of this ranking for April 2026. The $1,299 starting price combined with the M5's 16-core Neural Engine, Apple Intelligence integration, and a measured 18-hour battery life in mixed workloads makes it the laptop I'd recommend to the widest possible range of buyers. Benchmarks from Tom's Hardware show the M5 Air outperforming every competing thin-and-light on single-core CPU performance and sustaining that advantage across the entire battery. For anyone not doing GPU-intensive work, this is the correct laptop.

The MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro holds second. The M4 Pro chip's performance headroom handles video editing, local LLM inference, and large compilation tasks that the M5 Air's efficiency cores cannot sustain at peak performance for extended periods. The MiniLED ProMotion display is the best laptop screen available. If you need sustained peak performance rather than all-day battery efficiency, the Pro earns its premium.

ASUS ZenBook A16 at rank 3 is the strongest Windows laptop in this list. The AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 chip's integrated RDNA 3.5 graphics and 50 TOPS NPU deliver genuine AI acceleration that Intel's competing Lunar Lake chips cannot match on local model inference. At around $1,099, it undercuts the MacBook Air's price while offering a 16-inch OLED display and Windows 11 compatibility for users committed to the Windows ecosystem.

Market note: Leaked specifications suggest Apple will announce a MacBook Neo at $599 — an entry-level MacBook targeting Chromebook and budget Windows laptop buyers. If confirmed, this would immediately displace the Acer Aspire Go 15 from this list and likely move the ZenBook A16 down one position.

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 is the most rational laptop purchase for most people in 2026
highlights.body: Eighteen hours of battery life is not a benchmark figure — it is what users in Tom's Guide's real-world tests consistently achieved in mixed productivity and media workloads. The M5's efficiency core architecture sustains performance through the full battery cycle without the thermal throttling that forces Windows thin-and-lights to choose between performance and battery. At $1,299, the MacBook Air M5 costs less than the Dell XPS 14, HP Spectre x360, and several other premium Windows alternatives that deliver inferior battery life and lower sustained performance.

highlights.title: ASUS ZenBook A16 is the Windows laptop answer for AI workloads in 2026
highlights.body: The Ryzen AI 9 HX 370's 50 TOPS NPU is the highest AI compute rating in any thin-and-light laptop under $1,200. For developers running local LLMs, designers using AI image generation tools, or professionals using Copilot+ features at full acceleration, the ZenBook A16's NPU headroom matters. The 16-inch OLED display at this price point is a genuine value add — most competitors at $1,099 offer 1080p IPS panels. The fan noise under sustained GPU load is audible, which is the main experiential tradeoff versus the MacBook Air's fanless design.

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 2026 has the best display in the Windows laptop segment
highlights.body: The XPS 14's 14.5-inch OLED touchscreen with 2880x1800 resolution and 120Hz refresh rate is the best display currently available in a Windows thin-and-light. The 120Hz OLED panel combined with Dell's color calibration produces a screen that competes directly with the MacBook Pro 14 MiniLED at a lower price. The tradeoff is battery life — the XPS 14 manages around 10-12 hours versus the ZenBook A16's 14-16 hours. For creative professionals who spend most of the day at a desk, this is the Windows laptop with the best visual output.

zh-tw.commentary:
MacBook Air 13 M5 在 2026 年 4 月依然排第一。1,299 美元起售加上 M5 晶片的 16 核神經引擎、Apple Intelligence 整合、以及在混合工作負載下實測 18 小時的電池壽命，讓它成為我可以推薦給最廣泛買家群的筆電。Tom's Hardware 的跑分顯示 M5 Air 在單核 CPU 性能上超越所有競爭的輕薄筆電，並且這個優勢維持到電池耗盡為止。只要你的工作不需要密集的 GPU 計算，這就是正確的筆電。

MacBook Pro 14 M4 Pro 排第二。M4 Pro 晶片的性能空間可以處理影片剪輯、本地 LLM 推理和大型編譯任務，這些是 M5 Air 的效率核心無法長時間維持峰值表現的場景。MiniLED ProMotion 螢幕是目前筆電市場上最好的顯示器。如果你需要的是持續峰值性能而不是全天電池效率，Pro 的溢價有充分理由。

ASUS ZenBook A16 排第三，是這份清單裡最強的 Windows 筆電。AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 的整合 RDNA 3.5 繪圖和 50 TOPS NPU 在本地模型推理上提供 Intel Lunar Lake 競品無法比擬的 AI 加速能力。約 1,099 美元的售價低於 MacBook Air，提供 16 吋 OLED 螢幕和 Windows 11 完整相容性，是堅持 Windows 生態的用戶最強的選擇。

市場消息：洩露規格顯示 Apple 可能將發表售價 599 美元的 MacBook Neo，針對 Chromebook 和預算 Windows 筆電市場。若屬實，Acer Aspire Go 15 將立刻從這份清單中被取代。

highlights.title: MacBook Air M5 是 2026 年對大多數人最理性的筆電購買
highlights.body: 18 小時電池壽命不是跑分數字，是 Tom's Guide 真實使用測試中混合生產力和多媒體工作負載下一致達到的結果。M5 的效率核心架構在整個電池週期內維持性能，沒有迫使 Windows 輕薄機在性能和電池之間二選一的熱節流問題。1,299 美元的售價比 Dell XPS 14、HP Spectre x360 和多款其他高端 Windows 替代品便宜，而那些機器的電池壽命和持續性能都不及 MacBook Air M5。

highlights.title: ASUS ZenBook A16 是 2026 年 AI 工作負載的 Windows 筆電答案
highlights.body: Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 的 50 TOPS NPU 是 1,200 美元以下輕薄筆電中最高的 AI 運算能力。對於跑本地 LLM 的開發者、使用 AI 圖像生成工具的設計師、或需要 Copilot+ 全速加速的專業人士，ZenBook A16 的 NPU 餘裕非常關鍵。在這個價位提供 16 吋 OLED 螢幕是真正的加分，大多數 1,099 美元的競品只提供 1080p IPS 面板。主要妥協是持續 GPU 負載下可聽見的風扇噪音，相比 MacBook Air 的無風扇設計是明顯的體驗落差。

highlights.title: Dell XPS 14 2026 在 Windows 筆電市場有最好的螢幕
highlights.body: XPS 14 的 14.5 吋 OLED 觸控螢幕，2880x1800 解析度加 120Hz 更新率，是目前 Windows 輕薄筆電中最好的顯示器。120Hz OLED 面板加上 Dell 的色彩校準，產出的螢幕直接和更貴的 MacBook Pro 14 MiniLED 競爭。主要妥協是電池壽命，XPS 14 大約 10-12 小時，對比 ZenBook A16 的 14-16 小時。對於大部分時間都在桌前工作的創意專業人士，這是視覺輸出最好的 Windows 筆電。
